Every eligible stock, ranked by JADE. Click any column header to sort, any ticker to drill into the stock detail. Use the global filter bar OR the per-column input boxes under each header.

Per-column filter syntax: type >3000 in JADE, >1.5 in Sharpe, <5000 in Price, >50 in any % column (interpreted as 50%), or a range like 1800-2400. Strings (ticker, sector, cap, vol) do substring match. Filters AND together — clear all with the Clear filters button.
